tool_args.label: Bus lane traffic effects - Hylan Boulevard
tool_args.raw_text: The diagram illustrates the effects of a bus lane on traffic for Northbound and Southbound movements during their respective peak periods.

payload.claim_text: The proposed bus lane on Hylan Boulevard would have varying traffic effects on car traffic (same, better, or worse) at different intersections during peak periods, while bus traffic would be better or same.
payload.description: Diagram shows car traffic would be worse at Jefferson Ave (NB), Midland Ave and Lincoln Ave (SB) northbound AM, while better at several other intersections. Bus traffic would be better at all locations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the effects of a bus lane on traffic for Northbound and Southbound movements during their respective peak periods.
